commit.message:
fix: disable navigationPreload for iOS PWA + sync-complete event

- Disable navigationPreload in SW (broke iOS standalone mode + offline)
- Move themeColor from metadata to viewport export (Next.js warning)
- Emit sync-complete event after syncPendingMutations succeeds
- CaeTab listens for sync-complete to refresh data immediately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add alembic files to backend Dockerfile for railway up deploys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: video upload webm support + PWA standalone mode preservation

- Add "webm" to CAE_ALLOWED_TYPES (backend rejected MediaRecorder output)
- Add 5min timeout to file upload requests (was 30s global default)
- Replace hard location.href redirects with event-based auth-logout pattern
- Use router.replace instead of router.push for PWA navigation stability
- Add viewport export to root layout for iOS PWA rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: PWA login scope, video upload corruption, CAE form responsiveness

- Move PWA meta tags from terrain layout to root layout metadata API
  so Safari sees them on /login (standalone mode works)
- Fix video upload: skip File double-wrapping when compressImage returns
  original file unchanged (compressed === file check)
- Make CAE/VT form responsive: sidebar collapses to horizontal scroll
  on mobile, wizard grids stack vertically on small screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update PROGRESS.md with PWA Sessions 1-4 completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: route protection, admin redirect, plan prices, portfolio upload errors

- middleware: redirect ADMIN from /dashboard → /admin/dashboard after login
- dashboard: fetch /api/dashboard/stats checks r.ok before setStats (prevents crash on 401)
- ErrorBoundary: "Retour" button → / instead of /dashboard (avoids crash loop)
- seed: fix plan prices Standard 500000→5000 FCFA, Pro 1000000→10000 FCFA
- DB: UPDATE subscription_plans prices to correct values (5000/10000/20000)
- storage: throw STORAGE_NOT_CONFIGURED in production without R2 instead of crashing
- portfolio API: return 503 with clear message when R2 not configured
- portfolio UI: display helpful message for STORAGE_NOT_CONFIGURED error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enable HTTP server request metrics for Prometheus/Grafana

Enable HTTP server observations and histogram distribution so that
http_server_requests_seconds_bucket and _count metrics are exposed
on the actuator/prometheus endpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix post creation to use JSON request body instead of query params

Add @RequestBody to FeedController, send content as JSON body in load
test client, and configure Redis ObjectMapper with JavaTimeModule for
proper date serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: production hardening — renewal price exposed, cron idempotency, dead types removed

- Add PRICE_RENEWAL to public settings whitelist so checkout reads it from DB
- Add FOR UPDATE lock in cron store order tx to prevent double stock decrement
- Remove dead pvSnapshot/totalPv/pv fields from store UI interfaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: remove dead PV code from verify cron and order email

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix neo4j container startup failure caused by read-only volume mount

Neo4j 5 chowns everything under /var/lib/neo4j/ on startup, which
fails on the :ro mounted init-graph.cypher. The file is already
mounted separately in the neo4j-init sidecar container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: enable plan renewal from UI + show $19 price in checkout

- planes/page: active plan button now shows "Renovar — $19" (clickable)
  instead of disabled "Plan activo"; routes to checkout?plan=X&renewal=true
- checkout: detect renewal=true param, show $19 (PRICE_RENEWAL setting),
  badge "Renovación", correct success messages and back navigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement news feed system with fanout architecture

Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 app with Nginx load balancer, Post Service
(PostgreSQL + Redis cache), Fanout Service (RabbitMQ → workers → News Feed
Cache), Neo4j graph DB for friendships, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring,
load test client, unit tests, and Docker Compose orchestration.

feat: add image upload to admin store product form

- File picker button next to each image URL input
- Uploads via existing /api/upload → Supabase Storage bucket
- Shows spinner while uploading, image preview after upload
- URL field still editable manually as fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: plan renewal at $19 + remove commission on upgrades/renewals

Renewal rules:
- First activation (NONE → plan): full price + 20% sponsor commission
- Upgrade (BASIC→PRO etc.): differential price, NO commission
- Renewal (same plan): fixed $19 USD, NO commission, extends expiry

Changes:
- pack-requests: allow same-plan renewal at $19 (AppSetting PRICE_RENEWAL);
  block only downgrades; extend plan_expires_at on renewal CRYPTO path
- admin/purchases: allow renewal approval; extend expiry (not reset);
  commission only when currentRank === 0
- purchases/verify cron: detect renewal by plan match; extend vs set plan;
  commission only on first activation
- activate-plan: allow renewal; extend expiry; commission only from NONE

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(sprint-6): subscriptions, admin dashboard, onboarding + test fixes

- Subscription management: plan cards, usage meters, comparison table, upgrade/downgrade dialog
- Admin dashboard: KPI stats (direct DB query, bypassing auth issue), stylists table with plan change + suspend
- Onboarding wizard: 4-step checklist, skip redirects to dashboard, auto-redirect on first login
- Help page: FAQ with 5 categories + WhatsApp support link
- Middleware: protect /admin/* routes, block suspended accounts
- Auth: role + suspended in JWT/session
- Prisma: AuditLog model, suspended field on User, onboardingCompleted on Stylist
- Fix: admin/stats used prisma.session (no JWT table) → replaced with order groupBy
- Fix: admin/stylists SelectItem empty string value → replaced with sentinel 'all'
- All 9.x Playwright tests: 6/6 passed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(fuse): prevent daemon crash on uncaught cell link errors (#3013)

Pattern recomputation triggered by FUSE writes can throw "Cannot create
cell link - space required" from compiled pattern code inside setTimeout
callbacks. These uncaught errors killed the Deno process and dropped the
FUSE mount.

Add try/catch around the reactive tree-rebuild callback in cell-bridge
and global error/unhandledrejection handlers in mod.ts as a safety net
for errors from compiled pattern code.

Also fix a pre-existing type error: fuse_reply_write expects bigint
(usize) but was receiving a number.

Fixes CT-1315

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: breakdown gastos por proveedor en tabla P&L

Cuando se expande Gastos Admin/Venta/Financieros en el P&L mensual,
ahora muestra subtotales por proveedor (FC) o descripción (CC)
en vez de por subcategoría PUC.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v3.6.9: persistent web context + live search in AI Chat

- Web search: any message containing "search for", "find online", "look up",
  etc. now triggers a live DuckDuckGo search and injects results into the
  LLM prompt, giving the AI up-to-date information beyond its training data
- Persistent web context: URLs fetched and searches run in prior turns of a
  chat session are stored in chat_sessions.web_context (JSON) and loaded on
  every subsequent turn so the AI retains web data across the conversation
- System prompt capability statement: AI is now explicitly told it has web
  access via this system; prevents incorrect "I cannot browse the internet"
  responses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Claude/fix product images u d93g (#48)

* Fix product image quality, gallery UX, and zoom functionality

- Set quality={100} on product images to prevent Next.js compression
- Redesign gallery: vertical thumbnail strip on desktop, horizontal on mobile
- Add image counter indicator (e.g. "2 / 4") on main image
- Rewrite ImageZoom to use CSS transform instead of background-image,
  fixing broken zoom for external/CDN images

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VXCrtHmg9rAhvGQZbGs3Nq

* Use high-res images from SYSCOM recursos (BancoFotografias) instead of thumbnails

- Import now prioritizes 'recursos' field (high-res images from ftp3.syscom.mx)
  over 'img_portada'/'imagenes' (low-quality thumbnails)
- Falls back to imagenes if no image recursos are found
- Add 'Actualizar imágenes' button to re-sync images for already imported products
- Extract collectImages() helper for reuse between import and re-sync

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VXCrtHmg9rAhvGQZbGs3Nq

* Use unoptimized images on product detail to prevent Next.js compression

Next.js Image optimization was compressing and resizing product images
through its pipeline, degrading quality. Using unoptimized bypasses this
and loads the original image directly from the source URL.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01VXCrtHmg9rAhvGQZbGs3Nq

---------

commit.message:
fix(llm-timeline): params bucket, url race, litemode prop, keys, dedup

- strip leading ~<> prefix before parseFloat in getParamsBucket
  so approximate params like ~45B are correctly bucketed
- add initialization guard ref to prevent url-write effect from
  clobbering query params before url-read effect settles
- pass liteMode prop through StaticView destructuring so /lite
  page correctly initializes in lite mode
- include model.org in react keys to prevent collisions when
  models share the same name and date
- deduplicate DEFAULT_FILTERS into single export from lib/utils
- fix rss feed favicon path from .ico to .svg

Co-Authored-By: duyet <me@duyet.net>

commit.message:
fix: make interpath fully self-contained for non-monorepo projects

sync-roadmap-json.sh was a delegation wrapper that walked up looking
for a parent script in the Demarch monorepo root. On fresh installs or
other projects, this always failed with "could not locate" error.

Changes:
- Replace wrapper with full self-contained implementation
- Add generate-module-roadmaps.sh to plugin (was only in monorepo root)
- Fix all commands/skills to use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} instead of
  hardcoded monorepo paths ($ROOT_DIR/plugins/interpath/...)
- Make monorepo detection dynamic (scan for plugin.json/CLAUDE.md)
  instead of hardcoding hub/*/plugins/*/services/*/ paths
- Make interleave template script optional with graceful fallback
- Fix propagate command to use self-contained script
- Remove Demarch-specific references from functional code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: preserve Chinese sentences with commas in Quick Add

Lines ending with sentence punctuation (。！？!?.) are kept whole instead
of being split by Chinese comma (，). This ensures the full sentence is
sent to the extraction API rather than fragments.

Comma-separated word lists without sentence punctuation still split normally.

Fix time being ~2min early: add 45s offset for processing+TTS latency

Phone call pipeline (tool call → LLM response → ElevenLabs TTS →

Also removed seconds from output — just hours and minutes.

commit.message:
fix(release): build dist on CI instead of verifying pre-built dist

The ncc bundle is non-deterministic across platforms (macOS vs Linux),
so the 'verify dist is current' check always fails in CI. Instead, build
the dist fresh in the release workflow, commit any changes back to main,
and retag before creating the GitHub Release.

commit.message:
fix(core): strip code fences from scope_compliant judge response

LLMs often wrap JSON responses in code fences even when instructed not
to. Add extractJson() to handle this for the internal judge response
parser. Does NOT apply to json_schema assertion (by spec, that is the
contract author's responsibility).

Verified with E2E tests against live Anthropic API:
- scope_compliant with judge_model omitted: model fallback works
- json_schema with LLM preamble text: fails as intended
- LLM call failure: correct ScenarioResult structure

Add intervals pattern with 11 problems across 4 archetypes

- Group 1: Merge, Insert & Scan (LC 56, 57, 228, 986, 1288)
- Group 2: Sweep Line & Scheduling (LC 252, 253, 1094)
- Group 3: Greedy Selection / Sort by End (LC 435, 452)
- Group 4: K-Way Merge with Heap (LC 759)

Added 3 missing problems: LC 228 (Summary Ranges), LC 252 (Meeting
Rooms), LC 1288 (Remove Covered Intervals). Preserved key insights
on sort-by-start vs sort-by-end and heap vs deque selection.

commit.message:
fix: RQC Assembly Inspector wrongly classified due to wrong column name

Root cause: _get_type1_position_category() used non-existent column
'QIP POSITION 1ST  CODE' instead of 'FINAL QIP POSITION NAME CODE'.
This caused position_code to always be empty, so the A1B check for
RQC_ASSEMBLY_INSPECTOR never matched, classifying all 26 RQC employees
as regular ASSEMBLY_INSPECTOR with Condition 10 applied.

Impact: 15 RQC Assembly employees had Condition 10 (5PRS qty >= 150)
FAIL and received 0 incentive. With correct classification, they are
exempt from Condition 10 per position_condition_matrix.json config.

fix: make payment proof viewer load correct receipt source

Add file-based cache layer to GetPaymentProof endpoint so proofs are
served from local disk after first successful WhatsApp download. This
prevents failures from expired media or token issues on subsequent views.
Also wraps business lookup in try/catch to prevent 500 when Businesses
table is unavailable, and clears cached proof on rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: campus map tiles not loading when tab starts hidden

The map container initializes inside a CSS `hidden` tab, so Leaflet
can't measure the container size. A single requestAnimationFrame
invalidateSize() wasn't enough. Added a ResizeObserver that calls
invalidateSize() when the container gains dimensions (i.e. when the
tab becomes visible).
